relevant_snippets: Reflects the views and opinions of Apollo Analysts. 1. Based on LTM Q3 2025 Apollo credit originations. 2. 97% of $219B of AFS securities designated NAIC 1 or 2.

• “Assets Under Management ” or “AUM.” For the definition of Assets Under Management, refer to page 5 of Apollo’s quarterly report on Form 10-Q for the quarterly period ended September 30, 2025, filed with the SEC on November 10, 2025 (the “Apollo 10-Q”).
~$300B2 of bank lending to private credit providers (~1% of regulated bank balance sheet assets3)
Private credit contribution to US economy in 2024 was ~2.5M jobs and ~$370B of GDP2

1. S&P CapIQ. 2. Includes total bonds & loans to industrial insurers includes Industrial Bonds, Hybrid Securities, Credit Tenant Loans, SVO Identified Funds, Bank Loans, Unaffiliated Bank Loans, and Unaffiliated Certificates of Deposit: Bonds. 3. AUM of private credit
